dialogueItems.name: Character Doesn't Have Enough Items Line 1
dialogueItems.text: I don't have all the pieces for the communications device.

dialogueItems.name: Character Doesn't Have Enough Items Line 2
dialogueItems.text: If I don't have all the pieces then I can't repair the device and I'll never be saved.

dialogueItems.name: Character Doesn't Have Enough Items Line 3
